content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Pair of Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/359/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum difference between two pairs of numbers.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and then find the minimum difference between two pairs of numbers.

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
min_diff = arr[1] - arr[0]
for i in range(1, n - 1):
    if arr[i + 1] - arr[i] < min_diff:
        min_diff = arr[i + 1] - arr[i]
print(min_diff)
